full_text:
Filtering empty tiles by maximum intensity of the tile is not working, too many of them have max=65535. Use median instead.

Threshold (median DAPI intensity per tile) = 2500, Worked but not perfect.

However the running time on empty tiles and non-empty tiles are the same: 
This image has 29*63=1827 tiles, each 2500*2500, each tile will take <100 second to segment (I will use 95s to calculate here), so the total time will be 48.2h. If we drop 364 empty tiles, the time will reduced by 9.6h, so the total time will be 38.6h.
